mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM faq_tbl
AND faq_category = #{faqCategory}
AND ( faq_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR faq_content LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY faq_no ASC
select * from qna_tbl where member_id=#{memberId} order by qna_no desc
mapper.insert: insert into qna_tbl values (qna_tbl_seq.nextval, #{memberId}, #{qnaTitle}, #{qnaContent}, null, 0, sysdate)
mapper.update: update qna_tbl set qna_title=#{qnaTitle}, qna_content=#{qnaContent}, qna_date = sysdate where qna_no = #{qnaNo}
